text:
Once upon a time in the sleepy town of Everwood, there was a peculiar little bookstore called Oddities &MORE. You might think there wouldn. Couldn't have one peculiar thing fewer. But that's just what Margalo booked.

She specialried old things. Odd stuff. Gems. Weird clocks.

One rainy afternoon, she checked out an old typewriter. It smelled of moth balls. Last thing she wrote was a poem about stars. She never showed it.

You know what she always wanted?A pet falcon. Never happened.

One night, though. After. Dark.

She took that letter opener.

Tomorrow. Tomorrow.

She found feathers. There were birds.

Why birds?

A secret.

On her window.

They chirpped. Forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
